log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Duergar — Armored Tank (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Duergar — Armored Tank
→ Bite: [d20:18+10=28 vs AC 20] HIT! 15 damage. Duergar — Armored Tank HP: 44/59
→ Bite: [d20:15+10=25 vs AC 20] HIT! 24 damage. Duergar — Armored Tank HP: 20/59
→ Bite: [d20:18+10=28 vs AC 20] HIT! 17 damage. Duergar — Armored Tank HP: 3/59
--- Duergar — Armored Tank --- HP: 3/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (3/59). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Duergar — Armored Tank is affected by Greater Invisibility.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Duergar — Armored Tank (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Duergar — Armored Tank
→ Bite: [d20:9+10=19 vs AC 20] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:14+10=24 vs AC 20] HIT! 22 damage. Duergar — Armored Tank HP: -19/59
→ Concentration save: [d20(ADV):16+4=20 vs DC 11] MAINTAINED!
══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Duergar — Armored Tank --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:6+4=10 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Duergar — Armored Tank --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hypnotic Pattern. Dodging to maintain concentration.
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
